caption: A woman with curly blonde hair tied up, wearing a black t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, is seated in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone. To her right, a yellow vertical strip separates her from a black wall featuring the red and white logo "BOSS TALK 101". Behind her is a monitor displaying the name "Johnson" in red text. To her left, a smaller logo reads "PODCAST" below a graphic. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands. She begins with a slight smile and an open gaze, which transitions into a more intense facial expression with a furrowed brow and squinted eyes as she continues talking and gesturing. The background and equipment remain static while her facial expressions and hand movements evolve as she speaks.
